name: Date-Nut Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine dates, water and baking soda. Bring to a boil.
2. Remove from heat and set aside to cool completely.
3. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease two 12-hole muffin pans with solid vegetable shortening or spray with a nonstick spray; set aside.
4. In a large mixing bowl, cream margarine and sugar until light and fluffy. Beat in eggs. Add flour and salt, beating until just combined.
5. On low speed, beat in the date mixture, vanilla extract and pecan pieces. Fill prepared muffin pans 3/4 full with batter.
6. Bake for 20-25 minutes. Makes 2 dozen muffins.
